Culture.name: Education & Culture
Culture.shortDescription: Build on cultural strengths and provide access to education.

Infrastructure.name: Infrastructure
Infrastructure.shortDescription: Meet local needs for transport, energy and digital connectivity.

Health.name: Health and Wellbeing
Health.shortDescription: Ensure healthy lives and promoting well-being for all.

Housing.name: Affordable Housing
Housing.shortDescription: Provide local affordable housing for all who need it.

BiodiversityAndEcosystems.name: Biodiversity and Ecosystems
BiodiversityAndEcosystems.shortDescription: Protect threatened species and conserve terrestrial and acquatic ecosystems.

ChemicalsAndWaste.name: Chemicals and waste
ChemicalsAndWaste.shortDescription: Manage toxic chemicals and solid wastes.

Employment.name: Employment and Decent Work
Employment.shortDescription: Provide full and productive employment for all.

Energy.name: Energy
Energy.shortDescription: Ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy.

Desertification.name: Desertification, land degradation and drought
Desertification.shortDescription: Negative environmental impacts caused by changes to water availability.

Education.name: Education
Education.shortDescription: Ensure inclusive and equitable quality education.

Forests.name: Forests
Forests.shortDescription: Support trees and forests and their multiple ecological, economic, social and cultural roles.

Industry.name: Industry
Industry.shortDescription: Foster sustainable industrialization and promote micro, small and medium-size enterprises.

Transport.name: Sustainable transport
Transport.shortDescription: Provide affordable and sustainable transport of goods and people.

Tourism.name: Sustainable tourism
Tourism.shortDescription: Enable tourism that takes account of its economic, social and environmental impacts.

Water.name: Water and Sanitation
Water.shortDescription: Ensure access to sustainable water and sanitation and mitigate water stress, overexploitation and pollution.

RuralDevelopment.name: Rural Development
RuralDevelopment.shortDescription: Reduce disparities between urban and rural areas.

Deforestation.name: Deforestation
Deforestation.shortDescription: Destruction of forests or other important vegetation through land clearing.

Dewatering.name: Dewatering
Dewatering.shortDescription: Removal of groundwater to enable subsurface access for mining.

Remediation.name: Remediate legacy sites
Remediation.shortDescription: Finance the remediation of legacy damage to terrestrial or acquatic ecosystems.

Footprint.name: Surface footprint
Footprint.shortDescription: The surface area influenced significantly by a mining operation.
